results.title: Washington State's Evans Kurui places sixth in 10K at NCAA Championships - Wed, 10 Jun 2026 PST
results.description: EUGENE – Washington State's Evans Kurui placed sixth in the 10,000-meter national final on Wednesday at the NCAA Championships, earning first-team All-America honors for the second consecutive season.

results.title: Ruling on loft conversion after it exceeded 'permitted development limits'
results.description: A loft conversion in Farnworth has been granted retrospective planning permission after exceeding permitted development limits, Bolton Council has confirmed.

results.title: Dubai Launches Longevity Authority to Lead Global Advanced Healthcare Race

results.title: Councillors seal offices to push for mobility loans
results.description: Frustrated by perceived delays in the disbursement of their K6 million mobility loans, some ward councillors yesterday boycotted duty while others sealed their respective council offices across the country. Ministry of Finance, Economic Planning and Decentralisation announced on Monday the release of funds for councillors’ loans through the National Local Government Finance Committee, and youth ...
